title: Theme Provider
description: Create a Context and a Provider component to share a theme value (light/dark).
problemStatement:
Global state bridge! Use `createContext` to create a `ThemeContext`. Wrap your component tree with `<ThemeContext.Provider value="dark">`.

**Requirement:** Define the context outside of the component.
hints: Context allows you to pass data throughout the tree without 'prop drilling'.
expectedOutput: A Context Provider wrapping child components
